metadata.description: GPT-Image-2 combined prompt skill — synthesized from YouMind-OpenLab, ZeroLu, and freestylefly. Covers 13 template categories, 20+ industrial templates, and special tricks from all three repos.

plugins.name: gpt-image-2-combined
plugins.description: Turn any image generation intent into a production-ready GPT-Image-2 prompt. Covers UI, poster, product, brand, photo, illustration, character, infographic, game, history, and more.
